title: GraphContextRef
description: A reference to a Graphify connectome entity used to provide relationship context at decision time. Read-only — no write path through this schema. GAIL OS canonical source; Graphify is the data authority.

graph_ref_id.description: Unique graph context reference identifier. Must use the 'gref-' prefix.

entity_id.description: Graphify entity node ID being referenced.

relationship_type.description: Relationship edge type if this ref describes a relationship (e.g. 'DEPENDS_ON', 'AUTHORED_BY', 'GOVERNS'). Null for entity-only refs.

target_entity_id.description: Target entity ID for relationship refs. Null for entity-only refs.

query_context.description: The question or context that triggered this graph lookup (e.g. 'connector scope validation', 'authority chain', 'entity neighborhood').

confidence.description: Confidence score for this context reference (0.0 = uncertain, 1.0 = certain). From Graphify query result.

graph_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the Graphify query that produced this reference.

source_ref_id.description: Optional SourceRef ID linking this graph context to a specific GAIL OS record. Must use the 'src-' prefix when present.
